meaning: n.皮影戏,将影子投射影幕上的技术,放射线透视照相
examples: If Shadowgraph series is the spirit of Buhui, the return of the soul, the Drum women series is the return of his mother.
The application of high-speed shadowgraph technology to flow field evolvement diagnosis of laser propulsion is presented.
Furthermore, the computational shadowgraph images were plotted based on the numerical results and relevant computational flow imaging (CFI) methods.
